characters.name: A.H.
characters.description:
A student attendingLiberty High School. This person is paired
withR.G.as described in a graffiti in theGirl's Bathroom.

characters.name: A.J.
characters.description: A female attendingLiberty High School. She is paired with and apparently lovesChrisas described in more than one graffiti in theGirl's Bathroom. A.J. Is named afterA.J. Langerwho playedRayanne. A.J. Langer wrote the graffitis on the walls of the set.

characters.name: Abyssinia Churchill
characters.description: Female sophomore attendingLiberty High School. Geometry whiz who hides her scholastic bent from her boyfriend and tutorsAngelafor the mid-term. She plays the role of Stage Manager inOur Town. Abyssinia was played byKaren Malina White.

characters.name: Ace
characters.description: A male attendingLiberty High School. He is a drug dealer and suppliesRayannewith three hits of ecstasy. He was played byRichard Danielson.

characters.name: Alexander
characters.description: He produced visual aides to helpHallie LowenthalandGraham Chasewith their meeting with investors for their restaurant plans. He was attendingStocks, Soups, and Sauces(conjecture based on Hallie mentioning him as if they both know him).

characters.name: Amber Vallon
characters.description: Amber Vallon is the mother toRayanne Graff. She lives with Rayanne in theirapartment. Their frenetic relationship causes turmoil every so often, and her unstructured discipline has enabled some of Rayanne's alcoholic tendencies. Following the complete opposite parenting methods ofPattywith Angela, she avoids communicating with her daughter about difficult issues, like dealing with her absentee father, though she truly does care about her. She practicesTarotcard reading, and works as an X-ray technician. She has always been a follower of The Grateful Dead. She was a Wharf Rat. She once served a BLT to Bob Dylan, who stiffed her for the tip. She has at least one sibling, a sister. This episode marks the first appearance of Amber, attending the school meeting with Patty in the aftermath of a gunshot at Liberty High School. She almost immediately shows her outspoken nature to Patty, and then to the entire congregation as she criticizes the methods of the principal in handling the incident. She told Patty about the sex rumor betweenAngelaand Jordanand gained both intrigue and scrutiny from Patty for her carefree personality.

characters.name: Andy Cherski
characters.description: Father ofSharonand husband ofCamille. Suffered a heart attack inStrangers in the House. He is 40 years old. He works in the lumbar business. He has a sister,Andy's sister.

characters.name: Andy Cherski
characters.description: Father ofSharonand husband ofCamille. Suffered a heart attack inStrangers in the House. He is 40 years old. He works in the lumbar business. He has a sister,Andy's sister.

characters.name: Andy Cherski's Doctor
characters.description: A male medical doctor. He treatedAndy Cherskifor his heart attack.

characters.name: Andy's sister
characters.description: Sister ofAndy Cherskiand aunt toSharon Cherski.

characters.name: Angel
characters.description: An Angel who appears as a homeless girl aboutAngela's age. She sings and plays guitar. In her human life she froze to death. It is possible she is something of a lost soul (homeless) and only becomes an angel after "earning wings" while helping Angela andPattyduring the events ofSo-Called Angels. Her name is credited simply as "Angel" but on the imdb.com "Trivia" section for this episode her name is given as "Joy". (It is possible that Joy was her human name) Angel is played byJuliana Hatfieldwho is a songwriter. She wrote and performed the song "Make It Home" for the episodeSo-Called Angels.

characters.name: Angela Chase
characters.description: Angela Chase Angela Chaseis a fifteen year old female who is a sophomore atLiberty High School. She is the daughter ofGrahamandPattyChase. She is the older sister ofDanielle Chase. She appears in all 19episodesand narrates all but two. Angela has been friends withSharon Cherskimost of her life. She and Sharon were Girl Scouts together and their mothers,Patty ChaseandCamille Cherski, have been friends since high school.

characters.name: Angela Chase
characters.description: Angela Chase Angela Chaseis a fifteen year old female who is a sophomore atLiberty High School. She is the daughter ofGrahamandPattyChase. She is the older sister ofDanielle Chase. She appears in all 19episodesand narrates all but two. Angela has been friends withSharon Cherskimost of her life. She and Sharon were Girl Scouts together and their mothers,Patty ChaseandCamille Cherski, have been friends since high school.

characters.name: Baby Cousin
characters.description: A young cousin ofAngelawho urinated on one of the Chase's pillows.

characters.name: Band
characters.description: A band that preformed during the episodeSelf-Esteem. Simply credited as "Band" they were portrayed byBuffalo Tom.

characters.name: Band Teacher
characters.description: A male staff member ofLiberty High Schoolwho teaches Band. On the mscl.com site he is named Doc in the script transcription and he is named simply Band in the Character section. .

characters.name: Barry
characters.description: A male attendingLiberty High School. He is paired withJo Joas described in a graffiti in theGirl's Bathroom.

characters.name: Bathroom Girl number 1
characters.description: A female attendingLiberty High School. She appears inPilot. She was played byFrancine Ribber.

characters.name: Bathroom Girl number 2
characters.description: A female attendingLiberty High School. Appeared inPilot.

characters.name: Bathroom Girl number 3
characters.description:
A female attendingLiberty High School. 
Appeared inPilot. She was played byBianca Lawson.

characters.name: Bernice Krakow
characters.description:
She is the mother ofBrian Krakowand Brian's older sister, (Brian's sister) and wife ofBob Krakow. She is a Behavioral Psychologist. She frequently disagrees with her husband who is a Freudian Psychiatrist. She is Jewish.
The Krakows eat balanced meals and discuss things which have deep symbolic meaning.

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: A male attendingLiberty High School. He was played byChannon Roe.

characters.name: Bob Krakow
characters.description:
He is the father ofBrian Krakowand Brian's older sister,Brian's sister) and husband ofBernice Krakow. He is a Freudian Psychiatrist. He frequently disagrees with his wife who is a Behavioral Psychologist. He is Jewish.
The Krakows eat balanced meals and discuss things which have deep symbolic meaning.

characters.name: Boy 1
characters.description: A male attendingLiberty High School. He has P.E. the same time asAngela.

characters.name: Boy three
characters.description: A male attendingLiberty High Schoolwho picks onRickie.

characters.name: Boy two
characters.description: A male attendingLiberty High Schoolwho picks onRickie.

characters.name: Boyd
characters.description: Pattyhired him to work atWood and Jones Printing. Boyd usually called in late. He was fired afterHalloween.

characters.name: Brad
characters.description: Brad, also known as Bradley, isHallie Lowenthal's erstwhile fiancee. Broke up with her at New Year's. He was played byJonathan Emerson.

characters.name: Brad (Brian's friend)
characters.description: A male friend ofBrian Krakow. Brian calls his parents to claim he is staying at Brad's house onHalloweennight.

characters.name: Brian Krakow
characters.description: A fifteen year old male sophomore attendingLiberty High School. He lives across the street from the Chases. He and Angelahave been friends since childhood. He is in love with Angela. He is a straight-A student and carries a triple minor. He is Jewish. His father isBob Krakowand his mother isBernice Krakow. His older sister (Brian's sister) is married and lives in Denver. He is the yearbook photographer. He plays flute and saxophone. He is left-handed. Brian has acar, but usually rides his bicycle.

characters.name: Brian Krakow
characters.description: A fifteen year old male sophomore attendingLiberty High School. He lives across the street from the Chases. He and Angelahave been friends since childhood. He is in love with Angela. He is a straight-A student and carries a triple minor. He is Jewish. His father isBob Krakowand his mother isBernice Krakow. His older sister (Brian's sister) is married and lives in Denver. He is the yearbook photographer. He plays flute and saxophone. He is left-handed. Brian has acar, but usually rides his bicycle.

characters.name: Brian's sister
characters.description: She isBrian Krakow's older sister and daughter ofBob KrakowandBernice Krakow. She lives in Denver, Colorado with her husband,Brian's sister's husband.

characters.name: Brian's sister's husband
characters.description: He is the husband ofBrian's sister. They live in Denver, Colorado.

characters.name: Brooke Kennedy
characters.description: A female sophomore attendingLiberty High School. She was voted Best Laugh on "The Poll".

characters.name: Bus Driver
characters.description: A bus driver.

characters.name: Camille Cherski
characters.description: Mother ofSharonand wife ofAndy Cherski.Patty's lifelong best friend. Forgave Patty for aBetrayal-like transgression in college. In high school, spread false rumors about Patty making out withMitchell Moscarellibehind theduck pond.  She was played byMary Kay Place.

characters.name: Carmen Twillie
characters.description: A member ofInner Voices. Singer and actress who portrayedChurch Choir Singer 3onMy So-Called Life.

characters.name: Casey Hall
characters.description: A female sophomore attendingLiberty High School. She was voted Hottest Sophomore Babe on "The Poll" andAngeladescribes her as the prettiest girl of the Sophomore class, possibly the whole school, and possibly the whole country. Casey and Angela are in Social Studies together.

characters.name: Castro
characters.description: A male client ofWood and Jones Printingwho listens to and trustsPatty.

characters.name: Chaperone
characters.description: A female who is the chaperone of the field trip to theMuseum.

characters.name: Charlotte
characters.description: A female attendingLiberty High School. She is inMs. Marian Chavatal's class.

characters.name: Chase Cat
characters.description: The Chase family cat is never seen.Grahamgives it better food thanPatty. It is mentioned in two episodes.

characters.name: Chelsea
characters.description: A female attendingLiberty High School. She was played byStephanie Dicker.

characters.name: Cheri Jacobs
characters.description: A female sophomore attendingLiberty High School. She was voted Best Dresser on "The Poll".

characters.name: Cheryl Fleck
characters.description:
Neil's girlfriend. Before datingNeilshe was withKirkand another man who had freckles. 
She attends aWeekendtrip to aBed and BreakfastwithNeil,Graham, andPatty.  She is played byLaura Innes.

characters.name: Cheryl Fleck
characters.description:
Neil's girlfriend. Before datingNeilshe was withKirkand another man who had freckles. 
She attends aWeekendtrip to aBed and BreakfastwithNeil,Graham, andPatty.  She is played byLaura Innes.

characters.name: Children's Services Officer
characters.description: A male police clerk of theDepartment of Children Services. He was played byRobert Katimswho is the father ofJason Katimswho was the show's executive story editor.

characters.name: Chris
characters.description: A male attendingLiberty High School. He is paired with and is the love interest ofA.J.as described in more than one graffiti in theGirl's Bathroom. Chris was the boyfriend ofA.J. Langerwho playedRayanne. A.J. Langer wrote the graffitis on the walls of the set.

characters.name: Chuck Wood
characters.description: Chuck is the adoptive father ofPatty, husband ofVivianand grandfather ofAngelaandDanielle. Served some time in the millitary. Felt as if he was "walking on eggshells half the time" while raising Patty. RanWood and Jones Printingfor thirty years. In 1992 he had a stroke and quit the business. He has since been retired and dodges the IRS. Owns a stationwagon and frequently takes trips. When his name is written last-name-first (Wood, Chuck) is becomes a pun on "woodchuck".

characters.name: Church Choir
characters.description:
A group which sings at theChurch.
Their members includeChurch Choir Singer 1,Church Choir Singer 2,Church Choir Singer 3, andChurch Choir Singer 4. The song they sing inSo-Called Angelsis "I Feel Like Going Home". This group was played by theInner Voiceschoir.
